_comment: This is an example of a custom prompt-driven workflow using the plan_form MCP prompt.

step_1.action: Call the plan_form prompt with an intent hint

arguments.intent: Customer Satisfaction Survey for SaaS Product

step_1.expected_behavior: The AI will ask follow-up questions about the product name, target audience, question categories, and whether anonymity is required.

step_2.action: AI collects missing information through conversation
example_questions: What is the name of your SaaS product?
Who is the target audience? (End users, Enterprise admins, Developers)
How many questions do you want approximately?

step_3.action: AI generates execution plan and calls validate_execution_plan

step_4.action: AI executes the plan using MCP tools

step_5.action: AI presents the final form URL to the user
step_5.example_output: Your form has been created! View it here: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/xxx/viewform
